info.title: DocuEye CLI
info.description: Command line interface for DocuEye. DocuEye is a tool that lets You visualize views and documentation created using Structurizr DSL.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: DocuEye CLI - A command line interface for DocuEye.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: --docueye-address
options.description: DocuEye address ex. http://localhost:8080.

options.name: --admin-token
options.description: The Admin token from DocuEye configuration.

options.name: --mode
options.description: Specifies import mode 'dsl' for import from dsl file, 'json; for import from json file. [default: dsl]

options.name: --file
options.description: Path to workspace file. Depending on mode option should be path to dsl file or json file.

options.name: --id
options.description: The ID of the Workspace. If not provided the new workspace will be created. Also if workspace with given id does not exists new workspace will be created.

options.name: --key
options.description: Unique import key. If not provided, one will be generated.

options.name: --source-link
options.description: Link to source version from which workspace is imported ex. link to PR or commit on github.

options.name: --linter-config
options.description: Path or Url to linter configuration file.

options.name: --docueye-address
options.description: DocuEye address ex. http://localhost:8080.

options.name: --admin-token
options.description: The Admin token from DocuEye configuration.

options.name: --id
options.description: The ID of the Workspace to be deleted.

commands.name: export
commands.description: Exports a workspace to given format.

options.name: --file
options.description: Path to workspace file.

options.name: --format
options.description: Specifies export format 'json' for export to json file. [default: json]

options.name: --file
options.description: Path to workspace DSL file.

options.name: --linter-config
options.description: Path or Url to linter configuration file.

options.name: --mode
options.description: Specifies validation mode 'dsl' for validation dsl file, 'json; for validation json file. [default: dsl]

commands.name: openapi
commands.description: Commands for working with OpenAPI specifications.

commands.name: import
commands.description: Imports or updates OpenAPI specification for given element.

options.name: --docueye-address
options.description: DocuEye address ex. http://localhost:8080.

options.name: --admin-token
options.description: The Admin token from DocuEye configuration.

options.name: --file
options.description: Path to openapi specification file for element.

options.name: --id
options.description: The ID of the Workspace where element exists.

options.name: --element-id
options.description: The ID of element for which this import is created. Required only if --element-dsl-id option is not set.

options.name: --element-dsl-id
options.description: The DSL ID of element for which this import is created. Required only if --element-id option is not set.

options.name: --docueye-address
options.description: DocuEye address ex. http://localhost:8080.

options.name: --admin-token
options.description: The Admin token from DocuEye configuration.

options.name: --id
options.description: The ID of the Workspace where element exists.

options.name: --element-id
options.description: The ID of element for which this operation is created. Required only if --element-dsl-id option is not set.

options.name: --element-dsl-id
options.description: The DSL ID of element for which this operation is created. Required only if --element-id option is not set.

commands.name: docfile
commands.description: Commands for working with documentation files for components.

commands.name: import
commands.description: Imports or updates documentation file for given element.

options.name: --docueye-address
options.description: DocuEye address ex. http://localhost:8080.

options.name: --admin-token
options.description: The Admin token from DocuEye configuration.

options.name: --file
options.description: Path to openapi specification file for element.

options.name: --element-id
options.description: The ID of element for which this import is created. Required only if --element-dsl-id option is not set.

options.name: --element-dsl-id
options.description: The DSL ID of element for which this import is created. Required only if --element-id option is not set.

options.name: --id
options.description: The ID of the Workspace where element exists.

options.name: --type
options.description: Specifies documentation file type. Allowed values are 'openapi' and 'asyncapi'.

options.name: --docueye-address
options.description: DocuEye address ex. http://localhost:8080.

options.name: --admin-token
options.description: The Admin token from DocuEye configuration.

options.name: --element-id
options.description: The ID of element for which this import is created. Required only if --element-dsl-id option is not set.

options.name: --element-dsl-id
options.description: The DSL ID of element for which this import is created. Required only if --element-id option is not set.

options.name: --id
options.description: The ID of the Workspace where element exists.

options.name: --type
options.description: Specifies import mode 'dsl' for import from dsl file, 'json; for import from json file.
